description_long: This is an acoustic guitar with a classic dreadnought body shape, featuring a light natural wood top and darker wood sides and back. The soundboard is adorned with a dark tortoiseshell-style pickguard and a simple wooden bridge, while the rosette around the soundhole is subtle and unadorned. The neck is made of a darker wood, leading up to a headstock with six tuning pegs arranged symmetrically, three on each side. The back and sides of the guitar are a rich, deep brown, contrasting with the lighter top. The strings run from the bridge, over the soundhole, up the neck, and are anchored at the headstock. The overall finish is smooth and slightly glossy, highlighting the natural grain of the wood.
description: A natural-finish acoustic guitar with a light wood top, dark wood back and sides, and a tortoiseshell pickguard. It features a classic dreadnought shape and six tuning pegs on the headstock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the light wood soundboard, soundhole, pickguard, bridge, and all six strings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's depth, curved body profile, and the transition from the light top to the dark sides.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dark wood back and neck, with no visible hardware or pickguard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the guitar's thickness and the smooth, continuous dark wood finish on the sides.
attribute_headstock_design: Symmetrical headstock with six tuning pegs, three on each side, no visible logo, standard acoustic shape
